onboarding.title: Welcome to Budget Tracker
onboarding.subtitle: Manage your accounts, transactions, and budgets in one place
onboarding.sampleDataDescription: We've set up 6 accounts, 5 sample transactions, 3 budgets, and 8 spending categories to get you started.

steps.title: Set up accounts
steps.description: Add your bank accounts, credit cards, and cash accounts. Track balances across all of them.

steps.title: Record transactions
steps.description: Log deposits, withdrawals, and transfers. Categorize spending and track against your budgets.

steps.title: Use your AI agent
steps.description: Ask your agent to record transactions, check balances, or see how you're doing against your budgets.

reference.overview: A personal finance tracker with double-entry accounting, budget progress monitoring, and spending categorization. Supports multiple accounts and transfer tracking.

concepts.name: Accounts
concepts.description: Bank accounts, credit cards, cash, and other financial accounts with real-time balances.

concepts.name: Transactions
concepts.description: Deposits, withdrawals, and transfers between accounts. Each is categorized and dated.

concepts.name: Budgets
concepts.description: Monthly or weekly spending limits per category. Track how much you've spent vs. your target.

concepts.name: Categories
concepts.description: Spending categories like Groceries, Housing, Dining, and Entertainment for organizing transactions.

prompts: Record a transaction: $45.50 at Whole Foods, category Groceries, from checking account
Show my budget status for this month
What are my top spending categories this month?
tips: Accounts are stored in accounts/ — each transaction references source and destination accounts
Budgets track spending per category over a time period (monthly, weekly, or yearly)
Tags in tags.json let you add extra labels like 'recurring' or 'one-time' to transactions

accounts.title: No accounts yet
accounts.description: Start by setting up your accounts — checking, savings, credit cards, or cash.
accounts.suggestedPrompt: Set up my accounts: checking account with $2,500, savings with $10,000, Visa credit card with $500 balance
